creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
I can't reproduce your problem. Can you try it again with latest stuff?  
Did you tweak anything in make.conf or else? There is no PORTREVISION at  
8, which it's only at 7.

---------------------------------------
# make WITH_GECKO=thunderbird -V DISTFILES
lightning-0.7-tb-FreeBSD7-i386.xpi
